description_long: This bungalow features a light wood exterior with horizontal paneling and a red gabled roof, creating a warm and inviting appearance. The structure is L-shaped, with one wing containing large glass double doors and two skylights, suggesting a bright, open interior. Multiple rectangular windows are symmetrically distributed along the walls, providing ample natural light. The main entrance appears to be a single wooden door with glass panels, located adjacent to a set of three windows. The roof is pitched and extends over both wings, with the larger section having a simple gable and the smaller wing featuring a cross-gabled design. The overall design is modern yet retains classic bungalow proportions, with no visible porch or veranda.
description: A light wood, L-shaped bungalow with a red gabled roof, large glass doors, and multiple symmetrically arranged windows. The design is modern and open, with skylights and no visible porch.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entrance, large glass double doors, and multiple windows under a red gabled roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting two skylights, a central window, and a symmetrical window arrangement on the roof and wall.
description_view_2: Rear and side view displaying the long stretch of wall with three windows and the intersection of the two roof sections.
description_view_3: Back view showing the plain gable end of the smaller wing, with no windows or doors visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front and side windows with skylights on the roof
